device: Galaxy Z Flip7, Exynos 2500, Xclipse 950 GPU
harness: MLCChat APK 1.0 (commit 9368488 / our debug build), driven via adb input + uiautomator dump
prompt: Write a short poem about the ocean and the moonlight in simple words that a child could read and enjoy as a bedtime story now please.
metrics_source: in-app TextView 'prefill: X tok/s, decode: Y tok/s', extracted via uiautomator dump after each generation reaches stable state
protocol: N=3 runs per model, sequential within model; ref measured first (already loaded from session 2), then home->TRIAD chat icon to load TRIAD, then 3 more runs. ~60-90s per generation, ~3 s cooldown between runs.

delta.interpretation: Both within 1 sigma of ref; gap is consistent with measurement noise. The decode std for ref alone (2.6 tok/s) covers more than the entire delta between models (0.9 tok/s).

phase5_single_run_comparison.verdict_after_N3_replication: Both Phase-5 gaps were within the empirical 1-sigma band of the single-prompt protocol; the prefill gap in particular (28%) was an outlier vs the new 3-run mean (25.3 v 25.5).
